chapter_title: Regul. by Tex. Dept. of Transp.
text: On October 1, 2005, all powers and duties of the Railroad Commission of Texas that related primarily to railroads and the regulation of railroads and that existed on that date were transferred to the department, as provided by Chapter 281 (Acquisition of Public Interest in Private Road by Certain Counties) , Acts of the 79th Legislature, Regular Session, 2005.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 5
### Chapter 111. Regul. by Tex. Dept. of Transp.
##### § 111.003 — Transfer of Railroad Authority

On October 1, 2005, all powers and duties of the Railroad Commission of Texas that related primarily to railroads and the regulation of railroads and that existed on that date were transferred to the department, as provided by Chapter 281 (Acquisition of Public Interest in Private Road by Certain Counties) , Acts of the 79th Legislature, Regular Session, 2005.

*Added by Acts 2009, 81st Leg., R.S., Ch. 85 (S.B.1540), Sec. 2.03, eff. April 1, 2011.*
